narrative:
Precinct Lawrence #1/Zoar (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 680 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
